localized_copy.listing_title: AULA WIN68 HE Max Magnetic Gaming Keyboard 60% USB-C Wired RGB
selling_points: Magnetic switch keyboard for fast gaming input

one_shot_generation_prompt: Use the attached AULA WIN68 HE Max Version magnetic gaming keyboard product image as the strict product reference. Generate a Shopee Malaysia ecommerce listing image pack as six separate square 1:1 product images in one cohesive 2x3 contact sheet preview, targeting individual 1024x1024 square exports. Preserve the keyboard's visible identity: compact 60% layout, black and red gaming design, red RGB/backlight feel, black keycaps with red legends, left-side WIN68 HE branding area, USB-C wired gaming keyboard look. Do not change the keyboard layout, do not invent wireless/Bluetooth/battery features, do not add copyrighted game UI, esports team logos, fake certifications, fake accessories, or unrelated props. Create these six final-looking listing assets: 1. Clean cover main image on white or very light neutral background, full keyboard visible, no text. 2. Premium RGB hero on a dark gaming desk surface with cinematic red glow and exact readable caption: Built for Fast Inputs. 3. Malaysia gaming desk lifestyle in a tidy modern apartment or bedroom setup, no copyrighted game content, with exact readable caption: Compact Setup for Malaysian Gamers. 4. Hands-only in-use image with a generic adult model typing/gaming, no face and no clothing logos, with stacked bilingual caption: Fast Response / Respon Pantas. 5. Feature infographic with exact readable callouts: Magnetic Switch / Suis Magnetik, 8000Hz Polling Rate / Kadar Polling 8000Hz, Rapid Trigger / Picu Pantas, USB-C Wired / USB-C Berwayar, DKS Support / Sokongan DKS. 6. Specification image with confirmed specs 60% Compact Layout, USB-C Wired Connection, and 16.8M RGB; leave exact dimensions and weight blank/editable. Style: premium ecommerce, sharp product detail, Shopee-ready, realistic commercial product photography, consistent black/red cyber esports visual language.
